subject: managing director and vice president elections

emails.subject: Managing Director and Vice President Elections
emails.subject_base: Managing Director and Vice President Elections
emails.body: Managing Director and Vice President Elections Congrats Sal very very well deserved. You are a top class colleague. Barry.

emails.subject: Re: Managing Director and Vice President Elections
emails.subject_base: Managing Director and Vice President Elections
emails.body: Re: Managing Director and Vice President Elections Thanks for your e:mail message and your voice mail at home. I appreciate your nice thoughts. I am in London all week is there anything that you or Jo need that I could bring back for you? Just let me know. I will be back in the office next Monday, the 22nd. --Sally Barry Pearce ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 01/13/2001 11:38 AM

emails.subject: Re: Managing Director and Vice President Elections
emails.subject_base: Managing Director and Vice President Elections
emails.body: Hopefully, those guys would stand out in the Woodlands like a sore thumb and would choose to go elsewhere. Would be nice to have them behind bars, however. Doesn't make George W.'s record on executions look like such a bad idea, does it? I left Houston on Sunday afternoon. Any new news on those 7? --Sally Barry Pearce ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 01/16/2001 12:53 PM
